title: Plant-Based Diets Go Mainstream
subtitle: 素食风潮背后的健康与环保逻辑

paragraphs.en: Plant-based eating has moved from the margins to the mainstream of modern food culture. What was once considered an eccentric lifestyle choice is now embraced by millions seeking better health, environmental sustainability, and ethical food consumption.
paragraphs.zh: 植物性饮食已从现代食品文化的边缘走向主流。曾经被认为是古怪生活方式选择的饮食习惯，如今被数百万追求更好健康、环境可持续性和道德食品消费的人所接受。

paragraphs.en: Research consistently links plant-rich diets to numerous health benefits. Studies show reduced risks of heart disease, certain cancers, and type 2 diabetes among those who prioritize vegetables, fruits, legumes, and whole grains. The fiber, antioxidants, and phytonutrients abundant in plants support overall wellness.
paragraphs.zh: 研究一致表明，富含植物的饮食与众多健康益处相关。研究显示，优先食用蔬菜、水果、豆类和全谷物的人患心脏病、某些癌症和2型糖尿病的风险较低。植物中丰富的纤维、抗氧化剂和植物营养素支持整体健康。

paragraphs.en: The environmental argument for reducing meat consumption has grown increasingly persuasive. Livestock farming generates significant greenhouse gas emissions and requires vast amounts of land and water. Shifting toward plant proteins could substantially decrease agriculture's environmental footprint.
paragraphs.zh: 减少肉类消费的环境论据变得越来越有说服力。畜牧业产生大量温室气体排放，需要大量土地和水资源。转向植物蛋白可以大幅减少农业的环境足迹。

paragraphs.en: Food technology has revolutionized plant-based options available to consumers. Innovative products now closely replicate the taste, texture, and appearance of meat without animal ingredients. Major fast-food chains and restaurants increasingly feature plant-based alternatives alongside traditional offerings.
paragraphs.zh: 食品技术彻底改变了消费者可选择的植物性产品。创新产品现在可以在不使用动物成分的情况下，高度复制肉类的味道、质地和外观。主要快餐连锁店和餐厅越来越多地在传统菜品旁边提供植物性替代品。

paragraphs.en: The transition to more plant-based diets need not be absolute. Many nutritionists advocate for flexitarian approaches that reduce rather than eliminate animal products. Finding a sustainable balance that considers personal health, cultural traditions, and planetary wellbeing may offer the wisest path forward.
paragraphs.zh: 向更多植物性饮食的转变不必是绝对的。许多营养学家倡导弹性素食的方法，即减少而非完全消除动物产品。找到一个考虑个人健康、文化传统和地球福祉的可持续平衡，可能是最明智的前进道路。
